evals.prompt: How do I find a decision maker's email at a company using Anymail Finder?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Decision Maker search to find emails by role category

assertions.name: mentions_decision_maker_search
assertions.description: Mentions Decision Maker search or find-email/decision-maker endpoint

assertions.name: mentions_role_categories
assertions.description: Explains role categories such as ceo, engineering, finance, hr, marketing, or sales

evals.prompt: How do I bulk find emails for 50,000 contacts in Anymail Finder?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Bulk Email Search workflow for large contact lists

assertions.name: mentions_bulk_search_capacity
assertions.description: Mentions bulk search supporting up to 100K rows

assertions.name: mentions_async_processing
assertions.description: Explains async processing with webhook or polling

assertions.name: mentions_credits_on_download
assertions.description: Mentions credits are charged on download not on creation

evals.prompt: How do I use the Anymail Finder API to verify an email address?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the verify-email endpoint for email verification

assertions.name: mentions_authorization_header
assertions.description: Explains Authorization header with API key
